concept: Telegram-only AI signal agent. No UI. No trading execution. Personal use. US stocks + crypto. Entry/exit zone reports with full reasoning. Self-improving via Karpathy wiki + autoresearch loop.

s1_structure.title: Structure & Architecture
s1_structure.pattern: asyncio.gather(TelegramHandler.run(), Daemon.run()) — single process, no web server

telegram/.formatter.py: build Telegram messages from signal data

engine/.orchestrator.py: 13-step pipeline — ported from pipeline/orchestrator.py, adapted for multi-market
engine/.regime.py: SPY regime detection — ported, adapted for crypto (24/7)
engine/.filters.py: earnings/liquidity/volume filters — ported, earnings filter disabled for crypto

analysis/.news.py: Yahoo Finance RSS + SEC EDGAR full-text search (free, no key)
analysis/.fundamental.py: FMP free tier — P/E, revenue growth, insider activity, institutional ownership

llm/.client.py: OpenRouter adapter — async httpx, model routing, retry with backoff
llm/.analyst.py: signal analysis prompts — injects strategy wiki + market data
llm/.reporter.py: parse LLM output → structured signal dict

memory/.wiki.py: Ingest / Query / Lint operations on knowledge/wiki/
memory/.profile.py: user profile derived from wiki — injected into every analysis
memory/.feedback.py: /did command processing — log to DB + trigger wiki ingest
memory/.learner.py: autoresearch loop — weekly signal outcome evaluation + weight updates

scheduler/.daemon.py: cron scheduler — US scans 3x/day, crypto 6x/day, learning loop Sunday

knowledge/.SCHEMA.md: user writes once — defines wiki structure and update conventions
knowledge/.raw/: append-only log of all raw user inputs and analyses

deleted_from_current_codebase: compliance/ — Shariah screener (user manages watchlist manually)

s2_knowledge_base.title: Knowledge Base — Karpathy LLM Wiki + Autoresearch Loop
s2_knowledge_base.core_principle: User feeds raw thoughts anywhere. LLM distills into wiki. LLM never lets wiki rot. User never manually maintains files.

INGEST.action: LLM processes raw input, updates 3-5 relevant wiki pages in knowledge/wiki/
INGEST.example: /note 'NVDA P/E at 60x, looks overextended' → updates wiki/symbols/NVDA.md + reinforces valuation-check rule in wiki/strategy.md

QUERY.action: Load wiki/strategy.md + wiki/symbols/SYMBOL.md + wiki/patterns.md as LLM context. Synthesize against fresh market data.
QUERY.result: Signal analysis checked against user's own criteria — not generic

LINT.action: LLM health-checks all wiki pages: contradictions, stale claims, orphan pages, data gaps
LINT.example: Detects: 'strategy.md says avoid earnings but patterns.md shows 3 earnings plays last month'

user_input_channels./note \"text\": free-form thought capture — ingested into relevant wiki pages
user_input_channels./think SYMBOL \"text\": pre-analysis thesis — included in next /analyze call
user_input_channels./did SYMBOL took: trade feedback — you took the signal
user_input_channels.SCHEMA.md edit: user edits once to define wiki structure and conventions

steps: 1. EVALUATE — pull last week signals + actual price outcomes from signal_outcomes table
2. COMPARE — which strategies predicted correctly? which failed by regime/market?
3. MODIFY — update confidence weights in wiki/lessons.md
4. BACKTEST — test updated weights against last 30 days historical data via engine
5. KEEP/REVERT — if accuracy improves: commit wiki changes. if worse: revert + log reason
6. REPORT — weekly digest to Telegram with accuracy stats + wiki changes made
autoresearch_loop.analogy: program.md = SCHEMA.md + wiki. train.py = confidence weights. val_metric = signal accuracy %

wiki_context_in_analysis.result: LLM checks signal against user's own criteria and flags violations explicitly

analysis./analyze SYMBOL: quick signal — technical only, ~30s, minimal report
analysis./analyze SYMBOL -full: deep report — technical + news + sentiment + catalyst, ~2min

drill_down./reasoning SYMBOL: full technical breakdown for last signal
drill_down./backtest SYMBOL 6m: backtest all 5 strategies on symbol, last N months
drill_down./why SYMBOL: entry zone rationale — why these levels specifically

feedback./trade SYMBOL took: signal taken — logs to DB, triggers wiki ingest
feedback./history SYMBOL 7d: past signals for symbol, last N days

system./scan: scan full watchlist async — delivers results as ready
system./scan -quick: technical-only, no LLM, fast (<5s per symbol)
system./status: system health, last scan time, OpenRouter rate status

report_format.philosophy: standard report includes confidence breakdown. drill-downs for reasoning, backtest, catalyst, sentiment.

long_report.target_anchor: multi-year resistance, analyst targets, Fibonacci extension
long_report.extra_field: Fundamentals line added — revenue growth, P/E, insider activity

report_format.chart_format: matplotlib candlestick PNG — EMA21, EMA55, volume bars, entry zone shaded green, stop red dashed, target green dashed

s4_data_strategy.title: Multi-market Data Strategy — US Equities + Crypto

us_equities.universe: NASDAQ + NYSE — any symbol Alpaca supports
us_equities.news: Yahoo Finance RSS (free, no key) + SEC EDGAR full-text search (free)
us_equities.fundamentals: FMP free tier — P/E, revenue growth YoY, insider buys, institutional ownership delta

crypto.feed: CoinGecko /coins/{id}/ohlc — daily candles, free tier 30 req/min, no key
crypto.universe: Major L1/L2 only — BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, AVAX, LINK, etc.
crypto.meme_coin_filter: auto-reject if market_cap < $5B OR coin_age < 2 years
crypto.news: CryptoPanic RSS (free, no key) + Reddit r/CryptoCurrency
crypto.earnings_filter: disabled — no earnings events for crypto

symbol_detection.logic: if symbol in KNOWN_CRYPTO_LIST → crypto. elif symbol.endswith('.T') → jp (Phase 2). else → us, verify via Alpaca assets API

crypto_only_differences: regime detection uses BTC dominance instead of SPY
liquidity filter uses 24h volume instead of avg daily volume

s4_data_strategy.phase_2: JP stocks — native TSE (yfinance *.T) + US-listed ADRs (Alpaca)

s5_agents.title: Agent Design — Bull / Bear / Analyst / Review

BearAgent.role: stress-tests bull thesis, builds bearish case

AnalystAgent.role: synthesizes bull+bear debate against user strategy wiki → final signal

ReviewAgent.role: weekly autoresearch loop — evaluate signal accuracy, update weights, detect user patterns

s6_backtesting.title: Backtesting Design
s6_backtesting.data_source: Alpaca free historical daily bars — up to 5 years. CoinGecko for crypto.

simulation.method: walk-forward — indicators computed on bars[0:i] only, no lookahead
simulation.entry: next bar open after signal fires

s6_backtesting.integration: AnalystAgent receives best-strategy backtest as context. Confidence dimension 6 (Historical Perf) populated from real backtest, not mock.

s7_caching_rate_limits.title: LLM Caching + Rate Limit Optimization
s7_caching_rate_limits.problem: OpenRouter free tier ~10 RPM. Full watchlist scan (30 symbols) = 90 LLM calls naive. Must reduce to ~5–10 actual calls.

layer_1_indicators.stores: all computed indicators (RSI, EMA, ATR, etc.)

layer_2_llm_response.savings: if price/indicators unchanged in 4h → return cached signal, no LLM call

layer_3_news.savings: news rarely changes meaningfully for swing trading in 2h

async_queue.pattern: asyncio.Queue — symbols enqueued, worker pool of 3 processes them
async_queue.rate_limiter: token bucket — max 8 LLM calls/min (buffer below 10 RPM limit)
async_queue.scan_behavior: Telegram gets 'Scanning 28 symbols...' then results stream in as ready

s7_caching_rate_limits.practical_result: 30-symbol scan fires ~5 fresh LLM calls (only symbols with changed state). Rest from cache. Total scan time ~3–5 min vs 30 min naive.

s8_migration.title: Migration Strategy
s8_migration.approach: new top-level structure in same repo. old code stays untouched until v2 verified working.
ported_with_adaptation: pipeline/orchestrator.py → engine/orchestrator.py (remove Alpaca-only assumption, add market dispatch)
core/regime.py → engine/regime.py (add crypto regime via BTC dominance)
core/trade_filters.py → engine/filters.py (disable earnings filter for crypto)
core/llm_client.py → llm/client.py (OpenRouter instead of Anthropic SDK)
